title: Associate Data Analyst
description: HubSpot is hiring an Associate Data Analyst for our Philadelphia office to support business analytics and insights. You'll analyze data from our marketing platform, helping hundreds of thousands of customers understand their growth. Work hybrid and grow your data skills at a leading SaaS company.
responsibilities: Analyze business and product data to identify trends and opportunities
Create dashboards and reports using business intelligence tools
Support A/B testing and experimentation initiatives
Prepare data for analysis and ensure data quality
Collaborate with product and marketing teams on data-driven decisions

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related field
skills: Business intelligence tools (Tableau, Looker, or similar)
Python or R for data analysis

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
